_documentation.description: Knuth overrides for script test cases
_documentation.key_format: script_sig and script_pub_key are required. key_fork is optional for disambiguation.

fields.key_fork: Fork flags for key disambiguation (optional). When specified, only matches test cases with exactly these forks.
fields.knuth_fork: Override the fork flags (output override, different from key_fork)
fields.reason: Documentation of why this override is needed

_documentation.duplicate_detection: Entries with the same (script_sig, script_pub_key) and same key_fork (or both missing key_fork) will cause an error. key_fork allows disambiguation when the same scripts appear with different forks.
_documentation.skip_tests: Array of test cases to exclude from conversion. Each entry must have script_sig, script_pub_key, and reason. Optional key_fork for disambiguation.

overrides.reason: PUSHDATA1(0x4c69) followed by raw data needs to be a single push in Knuth format
PUSHDATA1(0x4c69) followed by raw data needs to be a single push in Knuth format

These reactivated opcodes (div/mod/and/or/xor) need bch_2018_may.
These reactivated opcodes (div/mod/and/or/xor) need bch_2018_may.
These reactivated opcodes (div/mod/and/or/xor) need bch_2018_may.

overrides.script_pub_key: NOP1 CHECKLOCKTIMEVERIFY CHECKSEQUENCEVERIFY NOP4 NOP5 NOP6 NOP7 NOP8 NOP9 NOP10 1 EQUAL
NOP1 CHECKLOCKTIMEVERIFY CHECKSEQUENCEVERIFY NOP4 NOP5 NOP6 NOP7 NOP8 NOP9 NOP10 2 EQUAL
overrides.reason: Knuth executes CLTV/CSV as NOPs when bip65/bip112 not enabled, reaches EQUAL which fails with stack_false

overrides.script_sig: 'NOP_1_to_10' NOP1 CHECKLOCKTIMEVERIFY CHECKSEQUENCEVERIFY NOP4 NOP5 NOP6 NOP7 NOP8 NOP9 NOP10
'NOP_1_to_10' NOP1 CHECKLOCKTIMEVERIFY CHECKSEQUENCEVERIFY NOP4 NOP5 NOP6 NOP7 NOP8 NOP9 NOP10
overrides.reason: Knuth executes CLTV/CSV as NOPs when bip65/bip112 not enabled, reaches EQUAL which fails with stack_false

IF in sig, ENDIF in pub: run() returns invalid_stack_scope at end because IF is not closed within same script. BCHN returns UNBALANCED_CONDITIONAL.
NOTIF in sig without ENDIF: run() returns invalid_stack_scope at end. BCHN returns UNBALANCED_CONDITIONAL.
IF in sig, ENDIF in pub: run() returns invalid_stack_scope. BCHN returns UNBALANCED_CONDITIONAL.
IF/ELSE in sig, ENDIF in pub: run() returns invalid_stack_scope. BCHN returns UNBALANCED_CONDITIONAL.
IF without ENDIF: run() returns invalid_stack_scope. BCHN returns UNBALANCED_CONDITIONAL.
IF in sig, ENDIF in pub: run() returns invalid_stack_scope. BCHN returns UNBALANCED_CONDITIONAL.
MUL overflow. Knuth returns overflow, BCHN returns INVALID_NUMBER_RANGE_64_BIT.
ADD1 overflow. Knuth returns overflow, BCHN returns INVALID_NUMBER_RANGE.
NUM2BIN size 521 exceeds max. Knuth returns invalid_operand_size, BCHN returns PUSH_SIZE.
NUM2BIN negative size. Knuth returns invalid_operand_size, BCHN returns PUSH_SIZE.

nPubKeys > 20 in CHECKMULTISIG. Knuth returns invalid_operand_size, BCHN returns generic INVALID_STACK_OPERATION.
nSigs > nPubKeys in CHECKMULTISIG. Knuth returns invalid_operand_size, BCHN returns generic INVALID_STACK_OPERATION.
In BCHN format '0x01 VER' means raw bytes [0x01, 0x62] which is PUSH1(0x62). Our parser treats them as separate tokens.
